ohtani.title: Adames, Devers power Giants to win over rivals
ohtani.blurb: Willy Adames and Rafael Devers each drive in multiple runs as they win the first in a four-game set against the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Cubs use seven-run 4th to win ninth straight game
imanaga.blurb: Cubs score seven runs in the bottom of the 4th to propel them to their ninth straight victory and 15th straight win at home

suzuki.title: Jacob deGrom tosses a gem in shutout win
suzuki.blurb: Jacob deGrom strikes out 10 and Evan Carter hits a two-run homer in the Rangers' 3-0 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Junior Caminero homers in Mother's Day win
yoshida.blurb: Junior Caminero goes deep and Nick Martinez allows just one run in the Rays' 4-1 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Jonathan Aranda, Richie Palacios drive Rays' 8-5 win
okamoto.blurb: Jonathan Aranda and Richie Palacios each accumulated three RBIs in the Rays' 8-5 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: White Sox rally in 8th to defeat Mariners
murakami.blurb: Davis Martin strikes out nine Randal Grichuk sparks an 8th-inning rally as the White Sox come back against the Mariners to win 2-1

matsui.title: Michael McGreevy twirls a gem in Cardinals' win
matsui.blurb: JJ Wetherholt hits a Little League grand slam and Michael McGreevy twirls a gem in the Cardinals' 6-0 win over the Padres
